title: Little Fish: Jurassic Bark
content:
As always, it's ad-free!

Dan, James and Andy discuss YOUR facts, including hippos and hip-hop. Dan's joke-telling career reaches its peak. And we name eight more Friend of the Podcast fact custodians.
